metadata.description: LLM Bulk Edit Benchmark - 20 scenarios testing 5 approaches across 2 file sizes and 2 change counts

changes.old: throw new Error(`Failed to fetch users: ${response.statusText}`);

scenarios.prompt:
Make these 5 changes to benchmark/fixtures/fixture-300.tsx using the Edit tool, one change at a time:
1. Change API_BASE_URL from /api/v1 to /api/v2
2. Change DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE from 25 to 50
3. Change admin role label from Administrator to System Admin
4. Change admin badge color from bg-red-100 text-red-800 to bg-purple-100 text-purple-800
5. Change heading from text-2xl font-bold to text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight

Make these 10 changes to benchmark/fixtures/fixture-300.tsx using the Edit tool, one change at a time:
1. API_BASE_URL /api/v1 -> /api/v2
2. DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE 25 -> 50
3. DEBOUNCE_DELAY 300 -> 500
4. CACHE_TTL 5 * 60 * 1000 -> 10 * 60 * 1000
5. admin label Administrator -> System Admin
6. viewer label Viewer -> Read Only
7. admin badge bg-red -> bg-purple
8. Error message to include status code
9. Search placeholder to Search by name or email...
10. Heading text-2xl -> text-3xl tracking-tight

Make these 5 changes to benchmark/fixtures/fixture-1000.tsx using the Edit tool, one change at a time:
1. API_BASE /api/v2 -> /api/v3
2. PAGE_SIZE 25 -> 50
3. admin label Administrator -> System Admin
4. Rename fmtNum to formatNumber
5. Rename AnalyticsDashboard to AnalyticsDashboardPage

Make these 10 changes to benchmark/fixtures/fixture-1000.tsx using the Edit tool, one change at a time:
1. API_BASE /api/v2 -> /api/v3
2. PAGE_SIZE 25 -> 50
3. DEBOUNCE_MS 300 -> 500
4. POLL_MS 30_000 -> 60_000
5. admin label Administrator -> System Admin
6. Rename fmtNum -> formatNumber
7. Rename fmtPct -> formatPercent
8. Rename UserTable -> UsersDataTable
9. Rename UserEditModal -> EditUserDialog
10. Rename AnalyticsDashboard -> AnalyticsDashboardPage

Read benchmark/fixtures/fixture-300.tsx, apply ALL 5 of these changes, then write the complete file back with a single Write:
1. API_BASE_URL /api/v1 -> /api/v2
2. DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE 25 -> 50
3. admin label Administrator -> System Admin
4. admin badge bg-red -> bg-purple
5. Heading text-2xl font-bold -> text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight
IMPORTANT: Use exactly ONE Write call with the complete file content.

Read benchmark/fixtures/fixture-300.tsx, apply ALL 10 of these changes, then write the complete file back with a single Write:
1. API_BASE_URL /api/v1 -> /api/v2
2. DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE 25 -> 50
3. DEBOUNCE_DELAY 300 -> 500
4. CACHE_TTL 5*60*1000 -> 10*60*1000
5. admin label Administrator -> System Admin
6. viewer label Viewer -> Read Only
7. admin badge bg-red -> bg-purple
8. Error message format
9. Search placeholder
10. Heading style
IMPORTANT: Use exactly ONE Write call with the complete file content.

Read benchmark/fixtures/fixture-1000.tsx, apply ALL 5 of these changes, then write the complete file back with a single Write:
1. API_BASE /api/v2 -> /api/v3
2. PAGE_SIZE 25 -> 50
3. admin label Administrator -> System Admin
4. Rename fmtNum -> formatNumber
5. Rename AnalyticsDashboard -> AnalyticsDashboardPage
IMPORTANT: Use exactly ONE Write call with the complete file content.

Read benchmark/fixtures/fixture-1000.tsx, apply ALL 10 of these changes, then write the complete file back with a single Write:
1. API_BASE /api/v2 -> /api/v3
2. PAGE_SIZE 25 -> 50
3. DEBOUNCE_MS 300 -> 500
4. POLL_MS 30_000 -> 60_000
5. admin label Administrator -> System Admin
6. Rename fmtNum -> formatNumber
7. Rename fmtPct -> formatPercent
8. Rename UserTable -> UsersDataTable
9. Rename UserEditModal -> EditUserDialog
10. Rename AnalyticsDashboard -> AnalyticsDashboardPage
IMPORTANT: Use exactly ONE Write call with the complete file content.

Make these 5 changes to benchmark/fixtures/fixture-300.tsx using the Edit tool. CRITICAL: Apply changes from BOTTOM of file to TOP to prevent line drift:
1. (LAST) Heading text-2xl font-bold -> text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight (~line 211)
2. admin badge bg-red -> bg-purple (~line 51)
3. admin label Administrator -> System Admin (~line 45)
4. DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE 25 -> 50 (~line 40)
5. (FIRST) API_BASE_URL /api/v1 -> /api/v2 (~line 39)

Make these 10 changes to benchmark/fixtures/fixture-300.tsx using the Edit tool. CRITICAL: Apply changes from BOTTOM of file to TOP to prevent line drift:
1. Heading text-2xl -> text-3xl tracking-tight (~line 211)
2. Search placeholder (~line 147)
3. Error message format (~line 88)
4. admin badge bg-red -> bg-purple (~line 51)

Generate a Python script that applies these 5 changes to benchmark/fixtures/fixture-300.tsx, then run it with Bash:
1. API_BASE_URL /api/v1 -> /api/v2
2. DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE 25 -> 50
3. admin label Administrator -> System Admin
4. admin badge bg-red-100 text-red-800 -> bg-purple-100 text-purple-800
5. Heading text-2xl font-bold -> text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight
Write the script to benchmark/temp_edit.py, run it, then delete the script.

Generate a Python script that applies these 10 changes to benchmark/fixtures/fixture-300.tsx, then run it with Bash:
1. API_BASE_URL /api/v1 -> /api/v2
2. DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE 25 -> 50
3. DEBOUNCE_DELAY 300 -> 500
4. CACHE_TTL 5 * 60 * 1000 -> 10 * 60 * 1000
5. admin label Administrator -> System Admin
6. viewer label Viewer -> Read Only
7. admin badge bg-red-100 text-red-800 -> bg-purple-100 text-purple-800
8. Error message to API Error ${response.status}: ${response.statusText}
9. Search placeholder to Search by name or email...
10. Heading text-2xl font-bold -> text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight
Write the script to benchmark/temp_edit.py, run it, then delete the script.

1. API_BASE_URL /api/v1 -> /api/v2
2. DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE 25 -> 50

5. Heading text-2xl font-bold -> text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight
